message:
test(simulator): E2E deterministic simulator replay fidelity (bd-37a.10)

16 E2E tests verifying recording + replay produces identical frame
checksums across all event types:
- Simple text input (+ 100-seed determinism proof)
- Window resize sequence (grow/shrink/restore + rapid burst)
- Rapid keystroke burst (20 keys + interleaved captures)
- Mouse event sequence (clicks + mixed mouse/key input)
- Animation with time injection (20-frame + 50-frame + events between)
- Combined full workflow (keys → resize → mouse → animation)
- Explicit record/replay with manual frame comparison
- Edge cases: empty scenario, init-only, events without ticks

Uses Lab::assert_replay_deterministic to verify byte-identical output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
